ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the school is located */,
  "locale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locale of the school */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the school is located */,
  "total_students_all_grades" INTEGER /* Total number of students in all grades */,
  "free_lunch_eligible" REAL /* Percentage of students eligible for free lunch */,
  "fte_teachers" REAL /* Number of full-time equivalent teachers */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "school_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "school_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "principal_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal */,
  "enrollment_year" TEXT /* Year of enrollment data */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_locale_id FOREIGN KEY ("locale_id") REFERENCES locales ("locale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locales" (
  "locale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locale */,
  "locale_name" TEXT /* Name of the locale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the locale */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the locale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the demographic data belongs to */,
  "american_indian_alaska_native" INTEGER /* Number of American Indian/Alaska Native students */,
  "asian_asian_pacific_islander" INTEGER /* Number of Asian or Asian/Pacific Islander students */,
  "hispanic" INTEGER /* Number of Hispanic students */,
  "black_african_american" INTEGER /* Number of Black or African American students */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Number of White students */,
  "race_ethnicity_other" INTEGER /* Number of students with other race/ethnicity */,
  "male_students" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female_students" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "other_gender_students" INTEGER /* Number of students identifying as other genders */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of students (e.g., 5-10, 11-15, 16-18) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the teacher belongs to */,
  "fte_teachers" REAL /* Number of full-time equivalent teachers */,
  "male_teachers" INTEGER /* Number of male teachers */,
  "female_teachers" INTEGER /* Number of female teachers */,
  "other_gender_teachers" INTEGER /* Number of teachers identifying as other genders */,
  "years_of_experience" REAL /* Average years of teaching experience */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree held by teachers (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  "district_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_district_schools" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school district */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id", "school_id")
)
